# Milestone 5 version 1.0A - January 1st 2021

## M5V1.0A

### About

This is the first public release of the Jewels (Android Game) image folder for the SeanPM Life Archive project. This release contains data from September 10th 2020 to January 1st 2021.

This is an annual release for 2021.

This release includes:

> * Images from September 10th 2020 to January 1st 2021

> * A Project Wiki

> * Basic documentation

> * No other content included in this release
